message:
test(layout): add 12 edge-case tests for Layout grid widget (bd-x93m1)

Cover 1x1 area, empty constraints, overcommitted fixed constraints,
gap > area, mixed is_essential, flexible row sharing, single-row/col
gap irrelevance, out-of-bounds children, and last-wins stacking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
